prompt:
Create a 9:16 vertical Instagram Story announcement post in 4K, EDC (Electric Daisy Carnival) festival aesthetic — celebrating that the boutique cannabis store CACTUS CLOUDS is now stocking MUHA MEDS products. Cinematic, hyper-saturated, premium poster-grade, dripping in neon and glow.

=== COMPOSITION (top-to-bottom) ===

UPPER QUARTER (header): the CACTUS CLOUDS logo at the top — render it FAITHFULLY from the FIRST reference image (white cursive 'Cactus clouds' wordmark with green outline, small white clouds + green saguaro cactus + butterfly motifs). Place it centered near the top. Add a subtle white-glow halo behind it.

UPPER-MIDDLE: a bold, festival-marquee headline broken across two lines, in a CHUNKY blocky display sans-serif with chromatic neon outline (pink-to-cyan rim) over solid white fill —
   line 1: 'NOW STOCKED AT'
   line 2: 'CACTUS CLOUDS'
   The headline should feel like an EDC stage LED panel — slight bloom, a thin scan-line texture, and a faint horizontal lens-flare streak crossing it.

CENTER (the hero band): the GOLD MUHA MEDS 'MM' emblem (FAITHFULLY from the SECOND reference image — ornate gothic interlocking M monogram in gold) rendered LARGE and centered, treated like an EDC mainstage moon — radiating concentric rings of neon laser light (hot magenta → electric blue → acid green → daisy yellow → white core). The emblem sits over a glowing daisy mandala (EDC's signature daisy iconography) made of bright concentric petal rings in alternating neon colors. Visible laser beams shoot outward diagonally from behind the emblem to the corners of the frame.

LOWER-MIDDLE (the product lineup): three MUHA MEDS product boxes arranged in a fan-out triptych on a glossy black reflective podium surface — left, center, right — each tilted slightly toward the viewer. Render each box FAITHFULLY from its reference image:
   • LEFT box: FROZEN POMEGRANATE box (THIRD reference image — red/pink gradient at the bottom with circuit-board pattern, MUHA MEDS gold emblem mid-front, 'SATIVA' label, FROZEN POMEGRANATE name plate at the bottom).
   • CENTER box: BLUE SLUSHIE box (FOURTH reference image — blue gradient bottom with circuit-board pattern, MUHA MEDS gold emblem, 'HYBRID' label, BLUE SLUSHIE name plate). Slightly forward / largest of the three.
   • RIGHT box: GALACTIC DIESEL box (FIFTH reference image — pink-to-purple gradient bottom with circuit-board pattern, MUHA MEDS gold emblem, 'INDICA' label, GALACTIC DIESEL name plate).
   CRITICAL — render ONLY THE BOXES. DO NOT include any vape pen / device / cartridge / atomizer / battery beside the boxes. Boxes only, standing upright on the podium. Each box reflects in the glossy podium surface (soft mirror gloss reflection). Subtle neon rim-light tracing the box edges in cyan and magenta.

FOREGROUND ACCENTS scattered around the boxes: large glowing daisies (EDC trademark — bright yellow center, white/pink/cyan/magenta petals) with light-streak trails; small green neon saguaro cactus silhouettes flanking the lineup; soft drifting neon-edge clouds in the upper-back layer tying back to the Cactus Clouds brand; lens flares, light particles, confetti sparkles, kandi-bracelet bead trails arcing across the frame.

BOTTOM STRIP: a thin chromatic neon rule (rainbow gradient), and centered below it small white all-caps text: 'AVAILABLE NOW · LIMITED DROP · 21+'. Below that, a tiny lockup combining the Cactus Clouds logo and the Muha Meds gold emblem separated by a small 'x' — the 'collab lockup'.

=== STYLE & PALETTE ===
Background: deep midnight indigo → black radial gradient, with a tall vertical glow plume of magenta/violet behind the emblem mimicking an EDC mainstage uplight column. Atmospheric volumetric haze. Distant city-of-lights silhouette of festival stages along the horizon line. Stars + sparkles dusted across the upper sky.
Lighting: heavy chromatic bloom, soft lens-flare streaks, prismatic light leaks at the edges, faint film grain. Everything reads electric, alive, festival-grade.
Palette: hot magenta, electric cyan, acid green, daisy yellow, royal violet, gold, and clean white — all sitting on midnight black/indigo.
Finish: glossy, glowing, premium poster-grade, no flat areas; every surface has either rim-light, glow, or reflection.

=== STRICT RULES ===
- ONLY THE BOXES from the three product references. NO devices, NO vape pens, NO cartridges visible anywhere.
- Preserve the Cactus Clouds wordmark layout and the Muha Meds gold MM monogram EXACTLY as in the refs — do not redesign either.
- Spelling: 'CACTUS CLOUDS', 'MUHA MEDS', 'BLUE SLUSHIE', 'FROZEN POMEGRANATE', 'GALACTIC DIESEL', 'NOW STOCKED AT', 'AVAILABLE NOW · LIMITED DROP · 21+'. All clean, no typos.
- 9:16 portrait, full-bleed composition, no border / frame / margin.
- Premium production quality — feel like an actual EDC main-stage poster crossed with a luxury cannabis drop announcement.
